APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Text Ruling

Application Pending For Waiver Of Additional Court Fees And Costs Pursuant To G.C. 68633, Crc 3.51, 8.26, And 8.818
Off Calendar Oct-13-2010 Text Ruling

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael Lieberman, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff The Granada, Inc. dba The Granada.
Plaintiff Witness Tony Davidauskis, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Todd Anthony D'Anna

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1000 Sutter St., #316, San Francisco, CA. 94109.
No money damages were sought in this unlawful detainer complaint.

Counsel to submit the Proposed Judgment to Dept. 218 for signature.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there are no appearances by defendant.
The trial date of SEP-27-2010 remains on calendar.
